scripts.sync:android: npm run build:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:debug: npm run sync:android && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/build-android-debug.ps1
scripts.api:secret:sync: test -n "$SESSION_SECRET" && printf '%s' "$SESSION_SECRET" | wrangler secret put SESSION_SECRET --config worker/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.api:deploy:remote: npm run api:secret:sync && npm run api:db:migrate:remote && npm run api:deploy
scripts.api:db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply bought --local --config worker/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.api:db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply bought --remote --config worker/wrangler.jsonc
